name: Banana Shortcake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon (tbsp) lemon juice OR a-pinch of unbuffered,
-corn-free vitamin C crystals, to taste, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the banana with a fork.
2. Whip until light and frothy.
3. If desired, add lemon juice or a pinch of vitamin C crystals for tang.
4. Toast the bread lightly in an oven toaster or dry frypan; homemade quickbreads do not fare well in a traditional pop-up toaster.
5. Assemble: Lay toasted bread on a plate.
6. Top with a dollop of mashed banana.
Note: If your Banana Bread is frozen, take it out the evening before serving. Use a serrated bread knife for slicing.
